subject: Project Management
title: Berlin Brandenburg Airport
description: A quick win: understand Berlin Brandenburg Airport.

hook.text: Berlin's new airport was supposed to open in 2011. It finally opened in 2020 — nine years late.

buildup.text: Original budget: €2.83 billion. Final cost: over €7 billion. Triple the price, nearly a decade late.

discovery.text: The fire safety system had 66,500 defects. Doors opened instead of closed during alarms.

twist.text: Six opening dates were announced and cancelled. The airport became Germany's national embarrassment.

climax.text: When it finally opened, critics noted it was already too small for Berlin's growing passenger numbers.

punchline.text: Nine years late and already outdated on day one.

quiz.question: How late was Berlin Brandenburg Airport?
